description_long: This humanoid robot features a striking blend of human and machine aesthetics, with a realistic human-like face framed by a white and gold armored helmet. The head is topped with a prominent, elongated ponytail-like structure extending backward, adding a dynamic silhouette. The face is expressive, with piercing eyes and detailed facial features, while the jaw and sides of the head reveal intricate mechanical components and black cabling. The shoulders are broad and armored, with gold accents and visible joint mechanisms, suggesting robust construction. The back of the head and neck area is densely packed with exposed mechanical elements, emphasizing its advanced robotics. The overall design is sleek, futuristic, and visually imposing, suitable for urban environments where both human interaction and mechanical durability are required.
description: A futuristic humanoid robot with a realistic face, armored white and gold helmet, and a long ponytail-like structure, featuring exposed mechanical components and expressive eyes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the human-like face, expressive eyes, armored helmet, and broad shoulders with gold accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the mechanical jaw, exposed cabling, and the full length of the ponytail-like structure.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the intricate mechanical details on the back of the head and neck, as well as the attachment of the ponytail.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mechanical jaw, cabling, and ponytail, with a clear profile of the face.
attribute_pose: The robot is in an upright, neutral pose with the head facing forward, shoulders squared, and no visible arms or legs. The head is slightly tilted downward, and the ponytail-like structure extends straight back.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring integrated white and gold armored panels and black mechanical components as its exterior covering.
attribute_facial_features: The face is highly realistic with human-like skin texture, expressive eyes, a defined nose, and a mouth. The jaw area is partially mechanical, and the face is framed by a helmet with gold accents.
attribute_limb_articulation: No arms or legs are visible; the shoulders suggest possible articulation points, but the range of motion cannot be determined from the visible geometry.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two forward-facing optical sensors (eyes) embedded in the face; additional sensors may be present in the helmet and jaw areas, but none are explicitly visible.
